name: Management Plane Groups - Specialized
description: Groups that gate elevated workload access without full-service blast radius. Classification follows the Clean Source principle: a group is Management Plane/Specialized if membership grants access to a specific workload subset, application role, or IT service function that does not reach full-service data control. Examples: SOC team groups (if scoped to specific tooling), JIT groups for third-party app admin roles provisioned via SCIM, Azure resource groups with scoped Contributor access.

groups.notes: SOC analyst group for incident response tooling. Membership grants access to Defender XDR and Sentinel workspaces scoped to the security operations function.
App access group provisioned via SCIM to a business-critical third-party application admin role. Classify at the level of the app's data sensitivity.
